ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Continued To Jun-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Brendan McElhatton (Petitioner). Robert Rothman for Megan McElhatton (Widow).

Mr. Der stated that they still had an issue with regard to the payout of the $10,000.00 gifts to the Minors in Ireland and requested a three week continuance to wrap things up. Mr. Rothman stated that he was withdrawing his objections pursuant to the settlement. The matter was continued to June 2, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Final Distribution will be amended. Mr. Rothman will not appear on that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-03-2010 Continued To May-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Settlement And Family Allowance
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Continued To May-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Continued To May-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Rothman for and with Meghan McElhatton. Ernest Der for Brendan McElhatton.

Mr. Rothman stated that they had a meet and confer and that the parties agreed to go to mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 26, 2010. A status conference is set for May 3, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
